filledFields.label: Message to the Hiring Team
filledFields.value: I am excited to apply for the Job Opening - Back End Developer (Intern) | DataChannel role at Datachannel, where I can bring my JavaScript, TypeScript, React experience as an aspiring Software Engineer.

filledFields.label: Why are you interested in this role?
filledFields.value: This role aligns with my goal of becoming a Software Engineer and uses skills I have practiced through projects and coursework.

filledFields.label: What makes you a match?
filledFields.value: My background in JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js closely matches the expectations in this job description.
